exampleSentences: Anh ấy rất giỏi tiếng Anh nên thường giúp bạn bè học.
Chị giỏi nấu ăn và thường làm nhiều món ngon cho gia đình.
Em muốn giỏi toán để có thể thi vào trường đại học tốt.

translation.en: He is very good at sports.

content.sentence: Anh ấy rất ___ trong thể thao.

example.es: Ella es muy buena en matemáticas.
example.en: She is very good at math.

definitions.vi: có kỹ năng hoặc thành thạo trong một lĩnh vực cụ thể
definitions.en: skilled or proficient in a particular area
definitions.es: habilidoso o competente en un área particular

notes:
Giỏi means good at or skilled at something. It describes a person’s ability.

It’s an adjective and usually comes after the subject: ai đó giỏi…  

Use it for skills, subjects, sports, jobs, or specific tasks.  
Stronger than just “khá” (quite good); opposite idea is dở or kém.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He is very good at English so he often helps his friends study.
She is good at cooking and often makes many delicious dishes for her family.
I want to be good at math so I can apply to a good university.
notes_md:
**Giỏi** means *good at* or *skilled at* something. It describes a person’s ability.

It’s an adjective and usually comes after the subject: *ai đó giỏi…*  

Use it for skills, subjects, sports, jobs, or specific tasks.  
Stronger than just “khá” (quite good); opposite idea is **dở** or **kém**.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong môn toán.

translation.en: She is very good at math.
